message.abyssredemptiondaomod.bishui_xic: The prayer bead wards away water and flame.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.zhiyuan_fe: The meteor bolt strikes its target.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.cangjing_y: The scripture leaf clears your mind.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.jieling_su: The lock seals the target's spiritual flow.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.shanhe_cuo: A miniature mountain crashes down upon the target.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.lihuo_fent: Undying earthfire coils around the target.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.fuyu_fanyu: The canopy calls down a spiritual rain.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.fulong_jin: The golden rope binds larger targets more tightly.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.chuanxiao_: The shuttle carries you through the sky in a warded streak.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.juling_wan: The banners raised a spirit field for %s cultivators.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.yinyang_hi: Sneak-use for life; use on a target for death.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.yinyang_li: The white face restores your vitality.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.yinyang_de: The black face strips away the target's vitality.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.wending_la: The elder reforges the damaged item in your off hand.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.zhaohun_qi: A thousand faces dragged %s targets into torment.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.duntian_wu: The formless spirit hides your presence from heaven.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.xiangmo_nu: The wrathful spirit shattered the target's enchantments.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.nongchao_y: A void tide banished the target.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.lietian_be: The weight of a star crashes down.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.wuxing_din: The tower seized the five elements from %s targets.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.suihan_kur: The bell froze an epoch around %s targets.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.zhutian_xi: The stars shifted and exiled the target.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.hunyuan_qi: The umbrella reversed causality to guard its bearer.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.fantian_fu: Altered gravity crushed %s targets toward the earth.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.qibao_qing: Purifying light stripped the power from %s targets.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.yinyang_ch: The furnace reshaped your body and restored its life.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.miedu_hong: The invoked true name made the spell unavoidable.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.guixu_ding: The sea pillar stabilized all chaos around you.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.suiyue_liu: Time reversed and nearly stopped for %s targets.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.wanfa_beny: The origin scripture blessed you with all arts.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.geshi_zhim: The gate opens. You arrive in %s.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.hundun_zhe: The chaos bell struck and hurled %s targets.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.zhongsheng: You sacrificed vitality to ignite the karma of %s targets.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.xukong_din: The void anchor bound %s targets in space.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.tiandao_ca: Heaven answered the judgment with lightning.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.consume_he: You consume %s and its essence enters your meridians.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.realm_too_: Your soul cannot bear this item. Required realm: %s.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.qi_too_low: Insufficient qi. This item requires %s qi.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.sword_flig: Not enough qi to begin sword flight.
You ride the sword upon the wind.
Your qi is exhausted; the sword can fly no farther.
The sword is too damaged to remain airborne.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.death_stag: Your Dao body is damaged; you lose one cultivation stage.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.death_real: Your foundation collapses; you fall to the previous realm.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.death_mini: Your cultivation is already at its lowest point.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.weapon_rea: Your realm is too low to wield a %s-rank weapon.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.meditation: Your meridians are sealed; you cannot cultivate.
Spiritual aura enters your body. Aura %s, progress +%s.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.dan_blocke: Dan poison remains; you cannot consume another pill.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.dan_backla: Dan poison backlash! Your meridians are sealed and cultivation stalls.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.dan_consum: The pill takes effect; your cultivation advances.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.sword_real: This sword is %s rank. Your realm is too low to invoke it.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.sword_qi_l: Not enough qi to invoke the spirit sword.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.sword_beam: Your qi is exhausted; the sword beam disperses.
tooltip.abyssredemptiondaomod.sword_rest: Insufficient realm prevents sword beams and reduces melee damage.
tooltip.abyssredemptiondaomod.blade_styl: Blades deal greater damage but cannot fire sword beams or enable flight.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.fuyao_hit: The Fuyao Fan's whirlwind disrupts %s targets.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.fuyao_miss: The Fuyao Fan stirs, but finds no target ahead.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.wenling_re: The Spirit-Seeking Dagger is %s rank; your realm is too low.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.wenling_em: The dagger falls still; no aura source lies within ten blocks.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.wenling_fo: The blade trembles: %s, %s blocks away, lies %s with aura strength %s.
tooltip.abyssredemptiondaomod.wenling_us: Foundation Establishment or higher is required to sense aura sources.
command.daomod.sect.already_joined: You already follow a sect and cannot switch freely.
message.daomod.stage_breakthrough: Your qi completes a cycle. You reach stage %s.
message.daomod.major_breakthrough: Heaven and earth resonate. You enter %s!
entity.abyssredemptiondaomod.ye_gucheng: Ye Gucheng, Keeper of the Path
entity.abyssredemptiondaomod.shen_duzhou: Shen Duzhou, Lone Star Sword Master
item.abyssredemptiondaomod.qinglian_jian: Azure Lotus Sword Immortal Spawn Egg
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.challenge_: You must reach %s before issuing this challenge.
%s answers the challenge. Nearby cultivators may join the battle.
A legendary challenger is already active nearby.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.legendary_: You helped defeat a legend. Cultivation progress +%s.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.challenge_: Complete the previous epoch challenge first.
advancements.abyssredemptiondaomod.legen: Help defeat an ancient bloodline legend
message.daomod.tribulation: Tribulation descends: endure %s bolts of heavenly lightning.
message.daomod.heart_demon: Your %s karma manifests as a heart-demon tribulation.
message.abyssredemptiondaomod.immortal_v: You fell from the Eternal Immortal Realm and slipped back into the Overworld
